---
title: "test_analyze_workflow.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_analyze_workflow.py"
loc: 16
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.92
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.94
---

## Intent
The `test_analyze_workflow.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_workspace, test_workflow_analyst_logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_workspace, test_workflow_analyst_logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.skills.local.workflow_analyst.analyze_workflow](file://src.skills.local.workflow_analyst.analyze_workflow)

### Exports
- `mock_workspace`
- `test_workflow_analyst_logic`
